site.title: AUTOCOM-26
site.fullName: 4th International Conference on Automation and Computation
site.location: GRAPHIC ERA HILL UNIVERSITY, DEHRADUN, INDIA.

about.heading: About AutoCom-26 (4th International Conference on Automation & Computation)
paragraphs: AutoCom-26 is the 4th International Conference on Automation & Computation, organized in physical mode from 22–24 October 2026, under Graphic Era Hill University, Dehradun. The field of Computation, Engineering & Automation has gained strong prominence through rapid advances in computing and integrated technologies, and the years ahead are expected to see expanded deployment of advanced computing systems, tools, and applications across industries and research domains.

The conference aims to connect researchers, specialists, and professionals from both industry and academia to foster collaborations across diverse areas of engineering, technology, and innovation. It provides a premier interdisciplinary platform for presenting the latest research findings, ideas, developments, and applications in all aspects of computational science and engineering.

AutoCom-26 continues the successful tradition of the earlier series — with previous editions (AutoCom-22, AutoCom-24, AutoCom-25) already conducted and their proceedings published, including indexed conference proceedings available online.

The conference brings together leading academic researchers and professionals from around the world to discuss cutting-edge trends in computing and communications. It is dedicated to fostering high-quality research and sharing innovative advancements across multiple domains. Participants gain opportunities to explore future directions, strategies, and priorities, exchange ideas for global collaborations, and stay informed about the latest technological developments and research discoveries essential for sustaining academic progress.
takeaways: Opportunity to present research at an established 4th edition international conference
Publication of accepted papers in recognized proceedings
Platform for global academic and industry collaboration
Exposure to cutting-edge research trends in AI, Communication, Security, Automation, and Intelligent Systems
Networking with distinguished researchers, keynote speakers, and experts
Discussion on future technological directions and research priorities
Knowledge sharing that supports academic sustainability and innovation growth

contact.address: Graphic Era Hill University, Society Area, Clement Town, Dehradun, Uttarakhand 248002
